Check for logical and functional dependencies in file 'global_student_digital_behavior_dataset_pre_processed.csv'

--------------------------------------------------------------------------
Data           | global_student_digital_behavior_dataset_pre_processed.csv
No. of rows    | 500                                                      
No. of columns | 47                                                       
No. of LDs     | 3519                                                     
No. of FDs     | 396                                                      
--------------------------------------------------------------------------


========================================
Logical Dependencies (LDs)
========================================

Condition | Implication               
--------------------------------------
Q = 0     | Functional dependency (FD)
0 < Q < 1 | Logical dependency (LD)   
Q = 1     | No dependency             
Lower Q   | Stronger dependency       
--------------------------------------

Note: Functional dependencies are a special case of logical dependencies.


Layer 1 (617 dependencies)
----------------------------------------
